name: Mary Mancini
subject: TOMORROW NIGHT! Join us in Murfreesboro
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/7hObdEYZv9TYzJEKR5yVrfwZDNcEiJ9jBJDk1hBIm94=)
Dear Peter,
Tomorrow evening (Monday, Dec. 3), we're heading to Murfreesboro for a stop on our TNDP **_ANALYZE, ORGANIZE, MOBILIZE_** Tour! Join us from **6-8pm CT** for a public forum -- an opportunity for you, as a member of the Tennessee Democratic Party, to discuss the 2018 election cycle and our path forward in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

**It 's free to attend, but please [click here to RSVP](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/qi5OwPRAIuS8seYBejB-NUr2UXXOJFcKx27nmQonPDc=) to let us know you're coming. **

Opportunities to [_**sponsor the tour**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/dNvIcMPxzkzy2m_LAu-6sGdU6L7pQ4bC9uGFBM_6AwA=) are also available to help defray costs. Sponsorship levels are detailed below.

And **[share the event on Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/PIa5RnfFwydKfs3QVpxrK88QjkZp0vlUeR9UVPptOQQ=)** to spread the word and invite friends, family, and neighbors.

Thank you so much for your support. We look forward to seeing you!

Mary and the TNDP Team
\--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

* * *

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/qi5OwPRAIuS8seYBejB-NUr2UXXOJFcKx27nmQonPDc=)
**TNDP Analyze **• **Organize **• **Mobilize Tour**
Monday, December 3, 2018 | 6-8pm CT
Patterson Park Community Center
521 Mercury Blvd. Murfreesboro, TN 37133
Sponsorships available:
Co-Host: $100
Host: $250
Co-Sponsor: $500
Sponsor: $1,000
Primary Sponsor: $2,500
Click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/qGwOJ4K2PNGVoiEQOe7PdiVaruP1_SamQP9j6MFlkYw=) to RSVP. Purchase sponsorships [_**here**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/dNvIcMPxzkzy2m_LAu-6sGdU6L7pQ4bC9uGFBM_6AwA=) or contact Sandra Sepulveda at [sandra@tndp.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/0FOlTUyV5eeWdqWzdOU0iUVdp9GkMTKNMGmgWdmjbGk=) or 615-327-9779.

* * *
** **
**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/dNvIcMPxzkzy2m_LAu-6sGdU6L7pQ4bC9uGFBM_6AwA=)**

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/PsBdFrFHlwKY73Cv-2-iinzPyM7NSpzyl-2s2bBJ4sQ=/PYoVyLefECpNVlbfIWnign1pDjV1wZdFT81USBWHSZU=).

Nashville TN 37203 United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Happy Hanukkah!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our deadline is tomorrow and I'm counting on you to help us out.
|

---
Friend,

Tonight is the first night of Hanukkah. Kristin, our daughters and I would like to wish all North Carolinians celebrating tonight a very happy Hanukkah. We wish for you light, joy, and peace during this season. Chag Sameach!

Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States
